subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by this Exile Whom Thy wretched servants have driven from His native land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بهذا المهاجر الذی اخرجوه عن وطنه عبادک الاشقیاء
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution
